We're Comfort Zone HVAC here in Scottsdale. Been doing this 15 years. We handle AC repair, maintenance tune-ups, and full system replacements. Diagnostic fee is $89, tune-ups run $149, and replacements typically start at about $4,500 for a basic 3-ton system, up to maybe $8,000 for a high-end unit. I've got two techs — Marcus and Tony — they both run 8 to 5, Monday through Friday. In summer we also do Saturdays. Emergency calls we try to get to within 4 hours.
